name: _Group_Tool_Executor
content: Plan comparator decision recorded: reuse=False, restart_at_step=1. The new plan significantly changes the methodology: it replaces the MLP regressor and GMM approach with a Conditional Neural Spline Flow (NSF), introduces data augmentation (3 noise realizations), and changes the validation and inference procedures (ensemble of 3 models). Since the core modeling approach and data processing pipeline are fundamentally different, no previous steps can be reused.
